subcodes.first_line: The Book of Há hath verily been sent down in this eventide from the presence of the Glorious One, in truth, unto him that possesseth a spirit [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب الهاء قد کان فی هذا الاصیل من لدی الجلیل بالحق منزولا من کان له روح من
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @spiritual transformation, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @Crimson Ark; the Ark of God
